summary: Successfully tested FoodTruck LaunchPad app upgrade with 2 new feature modules (Target Customer Profiling and Recipe Builder). Dashboard correctly shows 11 screen cards with updated badges. All new functionality is working correctly including interactive elements, real-time updates, and navigation.

design_issues.issue: Page may have loading issues when navigated from dashboard card click
design_issues.note: This is an existing page issue, not related to new features

passed_tests: Dashboard successfully upgraded to show 11 screen cards (from 9)
Dashboard badges correctly show '11 Screens', '7 Phases', 'Production Ready'
Target Customer Profiling - 5 archetype selection cards working with multi-select functionality
Target Customer Profiling - demographic age range slider functional (24-45 years default)
Target Customer Profiling - income level buttons working (4 levels: $, $$, $$$, $$$$)
Target Customer Profiling - real-time persona preview panel updates correctly
Target Customer Profiling - Download Persona PDF button present and accessible
Recipe Builder - recipe stats bar shows all 4 metrics (Prep: 45min, Cook: 12h, Yield: 24 servings, Cost: $3.82)
Recipe Builder - ingredients list displays 4 ingredients with proper SKU, quantity, unit cost, and totals
Recipe Builder - cooking method shows 3 detailed steps with time and temperature indicators
Recipe Builder - Add Ingredient and Add Step buttons are clickable and functional
Recipe Builder - Save Recipe button present and accessible
Navigation from dashboard to both new pages works correctly
Direct URL navigation to /target-customer and /recipe-builder works
Navigation back to dashboard from Recipe Builder works
Industrial-luxe dark theme consistency maintained across new pages
Orange primary color (#ec7f13) properly implemented in new modules
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for robust testing
Mobile responsive design working on new pages
Typography and spacing consistent with existing design system
